events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes EMT bending & installation on a commercial project at rough-complete stage, with the observed field condition being "improper coupling engagement." The task says to treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.

Improper coupling engagement is a defect - EMT couplings need to be properly engaged to meet NEC requirements. This is non-compliant work.

Decision: fail (non-compliant work)
Risk: medium (improper coupling engagement could lead to conduit separation, grounding issues)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: 70
Value: 0 (no numeric reading requested)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: improper coupling engagement on EMT installations
Actions: re-engage couplings properly, inspect all couplings
References: NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 (fill)

    "Identify all EMT couplings with improper engagement and rework to full seating per manufacturer and NEC requirements",
